gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.

Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos amid dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, as event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos amid dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos amid dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
